song.title: For Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Under an eastern sky, Amid a rabble’s cry, A Man went forth to die, For me! for me!
[V2] 2) Thorn-crowned His blessed head, Bloodstained His every tread; Cross-laden He was led, For me! for me!
[V3] 3) Pierced His hands and feet, Three hours o’er Him beat Fierce rays of noontide heat, For me! for me!
[V4] 4) Thus wert Thou made all mine; Lord, make me wholly Thine; Grant grace and strength divine To me! to me!
[V5] 5) In thought and word and deed, Thy will to do, O lead My soul, e’en though it bleed, To Thee, To Thee.
song.author: Albert B. Simpson
